data.title: Henry Schein names a new CEO
data.description: The leadership change comes as Henry Schein continues to invest in digital ordering, ecommerce tools, and integrated supply chain systems for dental and medical practices.

data.title: UniPro Foodservice rolls out centralized product data platform for distributors
data.description: The cooperative said its platform has processed more than 1.6 million products to date and is enriching between 2,000 and 3,000 SKUs per day as new or updated information is added.

data.title: GSA expands transactional data reporting
data.description: With reporting now mandatory across the agency, GSA projects total annual cost avoidance of about $50 million.

data.title: Wayfair signs on to use Google's Universal Commerce Protocol
data.description: The home furnishings retailer joins Walmart as an early adopter for Google's Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) with a goal of maintaining control of product listings in Google AI experiences.

data.title: Glass rolls out AI upgrade to government purchasing marketplace
data.description: G-Commerce has processed more than $8 million in government purchases to date, delivered more than 6 million products to public agencies, and directed more than $4.6 million in spending to small businesses.
